_comment: Manual composition rules. Each rule defines a family pattern with one or more bases; each composition spec is templated with {b} substituted by the current base. The resolver (compositions.py) auto-derives per-symbol offsets by canonical sub-path matching in the source SVGs. Optionally, a part can carry a `position_from` chain — a list of [target, part] pairs — to override the auto-derived offset with a sum of offsets from earlier-resolved compositions. That keeps the left/right placement of a sub-symbol identical across every parent that includes it.
_multiples_doc: Each entry: every variant of `target_base` (across all fills+rotations) is N copies of the single glyph `single`. N is auto-detected as (target_sub_paths / single_sub_paths) — typically 2 or 3 per fill digit. The resolver finds each copy's position inside the target via canonical sub-path matching.

multiples._comment: SQUEEZE FLICK ALTERNATING fill 0 — 3 flicks + 2 squeezes (8 sub-paths)
SQUEEZE FLICK ALTERNATING fill 1 — 2 flicks + 3 squeezes (7 sub-paths)

_rotation_dedup_doc: Each entry: for `target_base`, every (fill, rot) variant with rot >= rot_offset is an exact-duplicate of the (fill, rot - rot_offset) variant. Emits 1-part composite refs to dedup the redundant outlines (a SignWriting convention where some rotation indices repeat the underlying shape).

rules.name: movement-paired-rotation
rules.comment: Pairs that combine a base S22a rot with the +4 rotation (180° opposite). User-specified: S23100 = S22a00 + S22a04 (MOVEMENT-WALLPLANE SINGLE STRAIGHT SMALL paired with its opposite-direction sibling). Iterates through the 8 rot variants of S231: rot=i uses S22a0i + S22a0(i+4 mod 8).

rules.name: face-direction-s308-s309
rules.comment: S308 + S309 (FACE DIRECTION POSITION NOSE UP OR DOWN [TILTING]). 3 fills × 16 rotations each. User-confirmed pattern: every fill-0 variant = S2ff00 + the corresponding fill-2 variant at the same rotation. Fill 1 entries are duplicates of fill 0 (so we only emit fill-0 compositions; fill-1 stay as their original outlines but should ideally point at fill-0).

rules.name: face-direction-s307
rules.comment: S307 family (FACE DIRECTION POSITION NOSE FORWARD TILTING). 6 fills × 2 rotations. Within rot 0: fill 0..2 = head + a specific marker (one of 3..5). Rot 1 column is the horizontal mirror of the rot 0 column.

rules.name: forehead
rules.comment: S311..S313: forehead/face marking families. The 00 variant is the head with a marker drawn at fill 1 (S{b}10). The marker is horizontally centred on the head; its vertical position is whatever the standalone glyph specifies (forehead crease near the top, asterisk near the centre).

rules.name: eyes
rules.comment: S314..S31f eye families. Five fills: 4=single (right), 3=both (right + M(right) side-by-side), 0=head+both, 1=head+right, 2=head+left (= M(right)). The 1/2 positions inherit from the 30 placement so left and right remain symmetric across the family. (Originally we suspected S317/S318 used S314 as their head reference, but their fill-4 glyph already bundles the full eye marker — open arc + blink/wink V — so they fit the standard head+marker pattern.)

rules.name: head-plus-30
rules.comment: Partial-fit eyebrow-style families where fill 0 (head + both) decomposes cleanly as head + fill 3, but fill 3 itself is hand-drawn as a single unit (so we don't decompose 30 = 40 + M(40)). Just compose 00 = head + 30 with horizontal centring.

rules.name: head-plus-marker
rules.comment: Two-fill 'head + single marker' family. Fill 0 is the head with the marker drawn; fill 1 is the marker alone. Marker is horizontally centred on the head; vertical position is whatever the standalone glyph specifies. Covers nose (S331..S334) and mouth simple (S33b..S355).

rules.name: eyebrows
rules.comment: Six-fill 'head + symmetric paired marker' family. Fill 4 is the base (right side); 5 = mirror of 4 (left); 3 = both side-by-side (no head); 1 = head + right; 2 = head + left; 0 = head + both. The 1/2 positions inherit from the 30 placement so left and right stay symmetric across the family. Covers eyebrows (S30a..S310), air-blow/suck (S335..S336), mouth wrinkles double (S357, S358).
